name: prescription-card
title: Prescription Card
description: Prescription with drug, highlighted sig, refill and prescriber metadata, status badge, and an alert slot.

props.name: sig
props.description: Dosage instructions, rendered as a highlighted block.

props.name: alert
props.description: Alert slot — render a DrugInteractionAlert here.

props.name: actions
props.description: e.g. a "Request refill" button, separated below the metadata.

clinicalNotes: The sig (dosage instructions) is the one thing patients must read, so it gets its own highlighted block rather than living in a metadata grid — pass it in patient-friendly wording, expanded from codes ("three times daily", not "TDS"). "No refills left" is flagged only on active prescriptions, where it's actionable; on completed/cancelled scripts it would be noise. Structured metadata renders as a definition list for screen-reader term/value pairing. The `alert` slot exists so interaction warnings appear inside the prescription context they apply to.
notes: Ported from petals_ui unchanged apart from import paths.
